en: Log on, tune in, find out.
Oh no, look, it's plopped up there. Recalculating.
I think there's a barrier in the middle of the road.
See? Bollards. Now what, clever clogs?
Continue 0.3 miles, then turn left. You're fired.
I love gadgets like GPS satellite navigation systems,
but I hate the fact that they're so difficult to use.
I think they were designed by sadists.
The problem is that computers don't react to how I use them.
